testcase.name: runScenario["Successful login", "Login functionality"](1)

testcase.name: runScenario["Successful login", "Login functionality"](3)

failure.message: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'AGASTHIYA', ip: '192.168.0.106'

testcase.name: runScenario["Successful login", "Login functionality"](3)

failure.message: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Possible causes are invalid address of the remote server or browser start-up failure. Host info: host: 'AGASTHIYA', ip: '192.168.0.106'
